topics.title: Comedy Sketches and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The show features a series of comedy segments, including a prank call about a stuck harmonica, followed by discussions on celebrity parenting, the quality of country music, and a recurring caller's grievances.

topics.title: Eric the Midget's Children's Book
topics.summary: The studio discusses Eric's upcoming reading of his children's book, "Dougie the Puggie Holiday Adventure," which features a plot involving a dog helping its owner pursue a celebrity.

topics.title: Caller Interaction and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a prank call from a fan posing as Carrie Underwood, followed by discussions regarding the Playboy Channel, celebrity relationships involving Seal and Heidi Klum, and upcoming comedy roast plans for Pat Cooper.

topics.title: Pat Cooper Interview and Career Discussion
topics.summary: The studio hosts Pat Cooper to discuss his career, his audition process for the Sopranos, and his upcoming roast.

topics.title: Comedy Roast of Pat Cooper
topics.summary: The studio features a roast of comedian Pat Cooper involving jokes about his personal life, his relationship with Joanne, and his career in the comedy circuit.

topics.title: Pat Cooper Comedy Career and Upcoming Shows
topics.summary: The studio features Pat Cooper discussing his upcoming stand-up dates, his status as a veteran comedian alongside Don Rickles, and his experiences with roasting and performing.

topics.title: Comedy Tour Logistics and Talent Management
topics.summary: The studio discusses the complexities of managing a comedy tour, including interpersonal conflicts between performers, the challenges of promoting shows with diverse acts, and the stress of coordinating guest appearances.

topics.title: Comedy Club Dynamics and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio explores the logistics of booking comedy acts, celebrates Artie’s 40th birthday with a large cake, and features Mike Walker's segment identifying fake celebrity news stories.

topics.title: Studio Interactions and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including the reading of fan mail, discussions regarding past radio segments, and personal admissions from the hosts about their experiences with various women.

topics.title: Staff Pranks and Workplace Discipline
topics.summary: The studio records a heated exchange where Howard reprimands his staff for executing a prank that disrupted the broadcast flow.

topics.title: Staff Conduct and Studio Pranks
topics.summary: The studio explores the consequences of staff members engaging in unauthorized practical jokes and failing to maintain professional boundaries during the broadcast.

topics.title: Media Reports and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming book releases from Artie Lange and Robin, the production of Stuttering John's new film, and various news stories including celebrity privacy violations and a lawsuit regarding restroom access.

topics.title: Medical Privacy and Public Health Risks
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal ramifications of hospital employees breaching patient confidentiality, the leading causes of childhood mortality worldwide, and various reports on criminal activity and public safety.
